Ministry Events

Worship experiences, crusades, and gatherings — in Canada, Nigeria, and across the globe.

History

Past Events

A record of what God has done through Hayah International Ministries.

Past
September 20, 2025

Ottawa Worship Experience — The Great Awakening

The Great Awakening is a global worship event organized by Hayah Ministries International, Ottawa, Canada.

The Great Awakening Worship Experience gathered massive worshippers across the globe, showcasing the power of God in worship.

Tony Graham Recreation Complex, 100 Charlie Rogers Pl, Kanata, ON K2V 1A2
See More Info
Past
2025 · Canada & Botswana

Canada & Botswana Worship Experience

In the spirit of the just concluded Worship Experience in Makurdi, middlebelt of Nigeria, Hayah Ministries took the next steps to reach out to God's people in Canada and Botswana in 2025.

This was another massive experience of God's mighty power of healings, deliverances, breakthroughs, and unusual blessings over His people. God has always shown up for man, and this was yet another time to experience Him in a greater dimension.

Get in Touch

Hayah Ministries International Inc.

A movement of Divine manifestation — called to reveal the reality of God in our generation. When God speaks, it must HAYAH.
